name:name: # ^ Tier-A row patch (mod_overrides.md §4) on core Item.tsv. This expansion is a
# ^ mod on tutorial.core; it changes a few core item cells without forking the file.
# ^ Column 1 is the parent primary key (name); patchOp carries the operation.
# ^ Empty cells in an `update` row mean "leave unchanged" (note the blank weight
# ^ on healthPotion and blank price on manaPotion).
# ^ DEMO of the §4.5 overlay+patch combo: ItemPricePolicy.tsv widened price to
# ^ gold|int, so this patch can set a NEGATIVE price (a "we pay you to haul it
# ^ away" clearance item) that the core gold (uint) type would otherwise reject.
